text:
Precision. Reliability. 30 Years of Electrical Manufacturing Excellence.

YOMIN ELECTRIC has been designing and manufacturing electrical equipment since 1996.

- 18,000sqm production facility
- 370+ team members
- 95+ countries served
- 12 million+ units shipped
- ISO9001 certified quality

From energy meters to current transformers, voltage stabilizers to fuse protection - we deliver factory-direct quality that global businesses trust.

Follow YOMIN ELECTRIC for industrial electrical solutions, product updates, and B2B partnership opportunities.

Visit www.yominelectric.com

#YOMINELECTRIC #ElectricalManufacturing #B2B #IndustrialEquipment #EnergySolutions #GlobalTrade #MadeInChina
